name: coffee_shop_profiles
description: User profiles and customer data. Contains names, preferences (likes/dislikes), allergies, feedback, and admin status. Use this table to answer questions about customer demographics, preferences, or to count total users.

name: user_email
description: Unique email address identifying the user. Primary key.

name: name
description: The full name of the customer.

name: likes
description: A list of flavors or items the user prefers (e.g. ['Vanilla', 'Dark Chocolate']).

name: dislikes
description: A list of flavors or items the user avoids.

name: allergies
description: Critical health information about customer allergies (e.g. ['Nuts', 'Dairy']).

name: location
description: The customer's preferred delivery or city location.

name: is_admin
description: Boolean flag indicating if the user has administrative privileges. Use this to find how many admins exist.

name: coffee_shop_products
description: The product catalog or menu. Contains item names, categories, descriptions, prices, ratings, and ingredients. Use this to answer questions about available items, menu variety, or pricing.

name: name
description: Name of the coffee or food item (e.g., 'Latte', 'Croissant').

name: price
description: Price of the item in Indian Rupees (₹).

name: category
description: Category of the product (e.g., 'Coffee', 'Desserts', 'Snacks').

name: description
description: Long form description of the product's taste and profile.

name: rating
description: Average customer rating for this product (out of 5).

name: ingredients
description: List of key ingredients in the product.

name: coffee_shop_orders
description: Transactional data for all customer orders. Contains user email, order items, total amount, status (pending/confirmed), and timestamps. Use this for revenue analysis, sales tracking, and order history.

name: items
description: JSON field containing ordered items. Important: to query item names/quantities, use: jsonb_array_elements(items) AS item. Each item has {name, quantity, per_unit_price, total_price}.

name: total
description: The total monetary value of the order.

name: status
description: Current status of the order. Possible values are 'pending' or 'confirmed'. Always filter for 'confirmed' in BI queries unless requested otherwise.

name: updated_at
description: Timestamp of the order. Use this for all date-based calculations (today, this week, monthly).

name: user_email
description: Email of the user who placed the order. Link this with coffee_shop_profiles to find customer details.
